ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient or guardian */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examinations" (
  "examination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the examination */,
  "examination_date" TEXT /* Date of the examination */,
  "examination_type" TEXT /* Type of examination (e.g., routine check-up, vaccination) */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who performed the examination */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations from the examination */,
  "vital_signs" TEXT /* Detailed vital signs (e.g., blood pressure, heart rate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the examination record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the examination record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examinations_hcp_id FOREIGN KEY ("hcp_id") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("hcp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examination_details" (
  "examination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in pounds */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Body temperature of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure reading */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate of the patient */,
  "oxygen_saturation" INTEGER /* Oxygen saturation level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the examination details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the examination details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_professionals" (
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare professional */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the healthcare professional (e.g., Dr., Nurse) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare professional (e.g., Pediatrics, Family Medicine) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the healthcare professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare professional */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home or office address of the healthcare professional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the healthcare professional record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the healthcare professional record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examination_performers" (
  "examination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who performed the examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examination_id", "hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "examination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination during which the treatment was prescribed */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment ended */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_examination_id FOREIGN KEY ("examination_id") REFERENCES examinations ("examination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "examination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination during which the medication was prescribed */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication ended */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the medication */,
  "pharmacy" TEXT /* Name of the pharmacy where the medication can be obtained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_examination_id FOREIGN KEY ("examination_id") REFERENCES examinations ("examination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, patient, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_users" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
